description: AI agents for wealth management — advisor productivity, client intelligence, compliance automation. Based on validated Schroders implementation (225 advisors, £72B AUM).

agents.name: Review Prep Copilot
agents.description: Assembles client review packs: portfolio summary, performance attribution, talking points, risk flags. Reduces prep from 4-6 hours to under 1 hour.
agents.value_narrative: Advisor capacity recovery — frees 3-5 hours per review cycle

agents.name: Next-Best-Action Engine
agents.description: Scores client engagement signals and recommends prioritised actions: rebalance prompt, attrition risk flag, cross-sell opportunity.
agents.value_narrative: 1% attrition reduction on AUM base — high-frequency, low-cost scoring

agents.name: Meeting Summarisation Agent
agents.description: Transcribes and summarises client meetings into structured notes with action items, compliance flags, and CRM updates.
agents.value_narrative: Eliminates manual note-taking and post-meeting admin

agents.name: Portfolio Commentary Generator
agents.description: Generates personalised portfolio commentary for client reports — performance narrative, market context, outlook.
agents.value_narrative: Scales personalised reporting without additional headcount

agents.name: Client Communications Drafter
agents.description: Drafts client emails, letters, and updates in the advisor's voice with compliance pre-checks.

agents.name: KYC Auto-Extract Agent
agents.description: Extracts and validates KYC data from uploaded documents — ID verification, address proof, source of wealth.
agents.value_narrative: Straight-through KYC processing — eliminates manual data entry

agents.name: Compliance Screening Agent
agents.description: Automated PEP/sanctions screening with risk scoring and escalation routing.
agents.value_narrative: Continuous compliance monitoring with reduced false positives

agents.name: Document Processing Agent
agents.description: Classifies, extracts, and routes incoming documents — account forms, transfer requests, mandate changes.
agents.value_narrative: Automates document triage and data extraction

agents.name: Risk Scoring Agent
agents.description: Portfolio risk assessment with scenario analysis — concentration risk, liquidity risk, regulatory capital impact.
agents.value_narrative: Automated risk monitoring replaces quarterly manual reviews

agents.name: Periodic Review Agent
agents.description: Generates periodic suitability reviews — client circumstance changes, portfolio drift, regulatory updates.
